creator: takefu@airport.fm
text:
Converting from NO_STAGE to staged

stage-QA out the Warning.
 dynamically linked, stripped

MASTER_SITES space was crowded mingled during the R264442.
 https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/?view=revision&revision=264442

pkg-descr www: tabs to change spaces.

Not using :: in patchfile name
 databases/db4/files/patch-dist::Makefile.in	-> patch-dist__Makefile.in
 databases/db4/files/patch-dist::configure	-> patch-dist__configure
 databases/db4/files/patch-dist::ltmain.sh	-> patch-dist__ltmain.sh
 databases/db41/files/patch-dist::Makefile.in	-> patch-dist__Makefile.in
 databases/db41/files/patch-dist::configure	-> patch-dist__configure
 databases/db41/files/patch-dist::ltmain.sh	-> patch-dist__ltmain.sh
 databases/db42/files/patch-dist::configure	-> patch-dist__configure
 databases/db43/files/patch-dist::configure	-> patch-dist__configure
 databases/db44/files/patch-dist::configure	-> patch-dist__configure
 databases/db46/files/patch-dist::configure	-> patch-dist__configure
 databases/db47/files/patch-dist::configure	-> patch-dist__configure
 databases/db48/files/patch-dist::configure	-> patch-dist__configure
